page.title: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit - Free Offline Tools for Global Creators
page.description: One-stop platform providing free offline frontend tools covering multiple vertical industries for global creators and practitioners.

hero.title: Free Offline Tools for Every Vertical Industry
hero.description: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit is a one-stop platform delivering free, privacy-first frontend tools to creators and professionals worldwide. Download, open locally, work offline -- no registration, no data collection, no compromises.

multiIndustry.title: Multi-Industry Coverage
multiIndustry.desc: From content writing to web development, our tools span every major vertical industry. Find exactly what you need, when you need it.

offlinePrivate.title: 100% Offline & Private
offlinePrivate.desc: Every tool runs entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device. No servers, no tracking, no privacy concerns.

openSource.title: Open Source & Free
openSource.desc: All tools come with full source code. Study, modify, and learn from production-ready code -- completely free of charge.

zeroBarriers.title: Zero Barriers
zeroBarriers.desc: No sign-up, no login, no paywalls. Just download the ZIP, unzip, and open in your browser. That simple.

steps.title: Browse Tools
steps.desc: Visit our tools catalog and filter by category to find the right tool for your workflow.

steps.title: Accept License
steps.desc: Click download, review and accept the source code license agreement.

steps.title: Download & Use
steps.desc: Get the ZIP file, extract it, and open index.html in any browser. Start working offline immediately.

securityPrivacy.title: Security & Privacy
securityPrivacy.desc: Password generators, AES encryptors, hash generators, and encryption utilities.

mathScience.title: Math & Science

aiMlUtilities.title: AI & ML Utilities
aiMlUtilities.desc: Prompt generators, token counters, model calculators, and dataset utilities.

weatherClimate.title: Weather & Climate

religionSpirituality.title: Religion & Spirituality

cta.title: Need a Custom Tool or SaaS Product?

download.modalDesc: Please read and accept the following terms before downloading:

download.term2: You are forbidden from repackaging, reselling, or distributing the source code as a standalone product without substantial modification.
download.term3: All risks arising from local modification and operation of this software are borne by the user themselves. YuanqiZhiKe provides no technical after-sales support.
download.checkbox: I have read and agree to the above Source License Terms

about.title: About Us - YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit
about.heading: About Us
about.subtitle: Empowering creators worldwide with free, privacy-first tools.
about.missionDesc: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit was founded with a simple belief: everyone deserves access to powerful, professional-grade tools -- regardless of their location, income, or technical background. We build free, offline-capable frontend tools that respect your privacy and put you in control of your data.
about.featurePrivacyFirstDesc: Every tool runs entirely in your browser. Your data never leaves your device. No servers, no tracking, no compromises.
about.featureCompletelyFreeDesc: No sign-ups, no paywalls, no hidden fees. All tools are free to use and free to download with full source code.
about.featureGlobalCommunityDesc: Our tools are designed for creators worldwide -- from independent developers to enterprise teams. Multilingual support ensures accessibility for everyone.
about.featureOpenSourceDesc: All tools come with full source code under a permissive license. Study, modify, and learn from production-ready code.
about.storyPart1: YuanqiZhiKe started as a small project to help Chinese creators access the same quality of tools that Western developers take for granted. Over time, we expanded our catalog to serve a global audience, growing from a handful of tools to a comprehensive toolkit covering content writing, design, development, business, and education.
about.storyPart2: Today, our toolkit serves thousands of users daily across dozens of countries. We remain committed to our founding principles: free, private, and open.
about.valueAccessibility: Accessibility: Tools should be available to everyone, everywhere
about.valuePrivacy: Privacy: Your data belongs to you, and stays on your device
about.valueTransparency: Transparency: Full source code, clear licensing, honest communication
about.valueQuality: Quality: Production-ready code that works reliably in real-world scenarios
about.valueCommunity: Community: Building together, sharing knowledge, empowering creators
about.getInvolvedDesc: We welcome contributions from the community! Whether you want to report a bug, suggest a new tool, improve existing code, or translate our tools into your language -- there are many ways to get involved.
about.involveReportIssues: Report Issues: Found a bug? Let us know via our GitHub repository
about.involveSuggestTools: Suggest Tools: Have an idea? Share it with us
about.involveTranslate: Translate: Help us reach more users by translating tools into your language
about.involveCustomDev: Custom Development: Need a tailored solution? Contact our development team
about.contactDesc: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy - YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit
privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Text: Welcome to YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit ("we," "our," or "us"). This Privacy Policy explains how we handle data when you visit and use our website and tools. We are committed to protecting your privacy and complying with GDPR, CCPA, and other global privacy regulations.
privacy.section2Intro: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit is designed with privacy as a core principle. Specifically:
privacy.section2Item1: We do not collect personal information such as names, email addresses, or phone numbers.
privacy.section2Item2: We do not require user registration or login.
privacy.section2Item3: We do not store any data you input into our tools on our servers.
privacy.section2Item4: All tool processing happens locally on your device -- no data is transmitted to any remote server.
privacy.section3Intro: We may use third-party analytics services (such as Google Analytics 4 or Cloudflare Analytics) to collect anonymous, aggregated website usage statistics. This data includes:
privacy.section3Item1: Pages visited and time spent on each page
privacy.section3Note: This information cannot be used to identify you personally. We do not combine analytics data with any personal information.
privacy.section4Intro: Our website uses cookies for the following purposes:
privacy.section4EssentialDesc: Required for basic website functionality (session management, preference storage). These do not require consent.
privacy.section4AnalyticsDesc: Used by Google Analytics 4 / Cloudflare Analytics to collect anonymous usage statistics. IP addresses are anonymized.
privacy.section4AdvertisingDesc: We display Google AdSense advertisements across our website pages. Google AdSense may deploy advertising cookies to deliver personalized advertisements according to visitor browsing behaviors. Visitors can disable personalized advertising by accessing
privacy.section4AdvertisingDesc2: All ad-related data collection follows Google privacy rules and global data compliance regulations.
privacy.section4CookieNotice: For detailed cookie categories and management options, please see our
privacy.section5Intro: Our tools are delivered as downloadable ZIP files containing standalone HTML/CSS/JavaScript. Once downloaded, these tools operate entirely offline. We are not responsible for any third-party services you may choose to integrate into your own use of the source code.
privacy.section5AdSenseText: This website displays advertisements served by Google AdSense. Google may use cookies and similar technologies to serve personalized ads based on your visits to this and other websites. You may opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google Ads Settings. For more information on how Google uses data when you use our partners' sites or apps, see How Google uses data.
privacy.section5AnalyticsText: We may use Google Analytics 4 and/or Cloudflare Web Analytics to understand website usage. These services collect anonymized data only. Refer to their respective privacy policies: Google Privacy Policy, Cloudflare Privacy Policy.
privacy.section6Text: Our website is served over HTTPS to ensure secure delivery of all downloadable files. We use industry-standard security measures to protect our hosting infrastructure.
privacy.section7Intro: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have the following rights:
privacy.section7Right1Desc: Request a copy of any personal data we hold about you.
privacy.section7Right3Desc: Request deletion of your personal data.
privacy.section7Right4Desc: Request that we limit how we use your data.
privacy.section7Right5Desc: Request your data in a machine-readable format.
privacy.section7Right6Desc: Object to our processing of your data.
privacy.section7Contact: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
privacy.section8Text: Our services are not directed to individuals under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we become aware of such collection, we will take steps to delete the information.
privacy.section9Text: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.section10Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

cookie.title: Cookie Notice - YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit
cookie.heading: Cookie Notice
cookie.section1Text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They help websites function properly and provide a better user experience.
cookie.section2Intro: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit uses the following categories of cookies:
cookie.section2EssPurpose: Maintain basic website functionality during your visit (session state, language preference, cookie consent choice).
cookie.section2EssDuration: Session or up to 365 days for consent preference.
cookie.section2AnalyticsPurpose: Collect anonymous, aggregated website usage statistics via Google Analytics 4 or Cloudflare Analytics.
cookie.section2AnalyticsData: Pages visited, time on page, referrer, country-level geography, browser/OS (non-specific). IP anonymized.
cookie.section2AdPurpose: Deliver personalized advertisements via Google AdSense based on browsing behavior.
cookie.section2AdDuration: Varies by Google (typically 13 months for IDE, 2 years for ANID).
cookie.section2AdLegal: Consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)) / Legitimate interest for non-personalized ads.
cookie.section2AdData: Pseudonymous identifiers, browsing history across sites, ad interaction data.
cookie.section3Intro: The following third parties may set cookies when you visit our website:
cookie.section4Intro: We explicitly do not use the following types of cookies directly:
cookie.section4Item2: Any cookies that collect personal data for our own marketing purposes
cookie.section4Item3: First-party tracking cookies beyond analytics/advertising disclosed above
cookie.section4Note: Note: Third-party advertising cookies (Google AdSense) are used as disclosed in Section 2.3. These are governed by Google's policies.
cookie.section5Intro: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to:
cookie.section5Item1: View what cookies are stored and delete them individually or in bulk
cookie.section5Item5: Delete all cookies when you close the browser
cookie.section5Note: Please note that blocking all cookies may affect the functionality of this website.
cookie.section6Intro: On your first visit, a cookie consent banner will appear allowing you to choose:
cookie.section6AcceptAllDesc: Allows essential, analytics, and advertising cookies.
cookie.section6EssentialOnlyDesc: Allows only strictly necessary cookies; blocks analytics and advertising cookies.
cookie.section6Storage: Your choice is stored locally in your browser for 365 days. You can change your preference at any time by clearing site data or adjusting your browser settings.
cookie.section6Consent: By continuing to use our website after making your choice, you consent to the cookie categories you have selected.
cookie.section7Text: We may update this Cookie Notice from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last Updated" date.
cookie.section8Text: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at:

license.title: Source Code License - YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit
license.heading: Source Code License Agreement
license.section1Text: YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit ("the Company") grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the source code packages ("Tools") provided on this website. By downloading, installing, or using any Tool, you agree to be bound by the terms of this Agreement.
license.section2Permitted1: Download and use the Tools for personal, non-commercial learning and educational purposes.
license.section2Permitted2: Modify the source code for your own personal use.
license.section2Permitted3: Run the Tools locally on your own devices.
license.section3ProhibitedItem1Desc: Repackaging, redistributing, or reselling the Tools or any derivative works as standalone products.
license.section3ProhibitedItem2Desc: Removing or altering copyright notices, trademark symbols, or attribution statements from the source code.
license.section3ProhibitedItem3Desc: Demanding technical support, bug fixes, or updates from YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit.
license.section4Text: You are allowed to deploy these tools on commercial websites or websites with advertisement monetization such as Google AdSense, provided that you retain all original copyright marks, source attribution statements of YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit, and do not resell the source code independently.
license.section4PersonalDesc: Free for personal learning, non-commercial projects, and educational purposes. No attribution required but appreciated.
license.section4CommercialDesc: Permitted to use the Tools on websites that display advertisements (including Google AdSense), provided that:
license.section4CommercialCond1: All original copyright notices and attribution statements are preserved in the source code
license.section4CommercialCond2: The Tools are not resold, sublicensed, or distributed as standalone products
license.section4CommercialCond3: No claim of ownership over the original source code is made
license.section4ProhibitedDesc: Repackaging the source code as your own product for sale, removing copyright notices, or offering the Tools as a paid service without substantial modification.
license.section5Text: THE TOOLS ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS, WITHOUT ANY WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. YUANQI TECH TOOLKIT MAKES NO REPRESENTATIONS OR WARRANTIES REGARDING NON-INFRINGEMENT, MERCHANTABILITY, OR FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE. THE ENTIRE RISK AS TO THE QUALITY AND PERFORMANCE OF THE TOOLS IS WITH YOU.
license.section6Text: IN NO EVENT SHALL YUANQI TECH TOOLKIT BE LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH THE USE OR INABILITY TO USE THE TOOLS, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES.
license.section7Text: You are solely responsible for any modifications you make to the source code and any consequences resulting from your use of the Tools. This includes but is not limited to:
license.section7Item1: Data loss or corruption caused by Tool malfunctions
license.section7Item2: Business losses resulting from incorrect Tool outputs
license.section7Item3: Legal issues arising from misuse of the Tools
license.section8Text: All intellectual property rights in the Tools, including but not limited to copyrights, trademarks, and trade secrets, remain the exclusive property of YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit. This Agreement does not transfer any ownership rights to you.
license.section9Text: This license is effective until terminated. Your rights under this license will terminate automatically without notice if you fail to comply with any term herein. Upon termination, you must cease all use and destroy all copies of the Tools in your possession.
license.section10Text: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit operates, without regard to conflict of law principles.
license.section11Text: For licensing inquiries beyond the scope of this Agreement, please contact us at:

customize.title: Custom Development Services - YuanqiZhiKe Toolkit
customize.heading: Custom Development Services
customize.description: Need a tailored solution? Our team specializes in building high-quality frontend tools, web applications, and SaaS products for businesses worldwide.
customize.serviceFrontendToolsDesc: Custom text processors, converters, generators, and productivity tools built with modern HTML/CSS/JavaScript. Fully offline-capable and browser-based.
customize.serviceSaaSDesc: Full-stack web application development with responsive design, user authentication, payment integration, and cloud deployment.
customize.serviceLandingPagesDesc: High-converting, beautifully designed landing pages optimized for speed, SEO, and mobile experience.
customize.serviceApiIntegrationDesc: Connect your tools to third-party services including payment gateways, AI APIs, databases, and cloud storage solutions.
customize.reasonCleanCode: Clean Code: Well-structured, maintainable, and documented codebase
customize.reasonResponsive: Responsive Design: Perfect experience across desktop, tablet, and mobile
customize.reasonFastDelivery: Fast Delivery: Agile development process with regular progress updates
customize.reasonSupport: Post-Delivery Support: 30-day free bug-fixing period after project handover
customize.getInTouchDesc: Describe your project requirements and we will get back to you within 24 hours with a detailed proposal and quote.
